layout_note: Typed attachment grid (spreadsheet print): columns SP/DC/JT | Asset Name | EIF | Block B: Value of Asset (Min/Max numeric column headers: 0-0, 1-1,000, 1,001-15,000, 15,001-50,000, 50,001-100,000, 100,001-250,000, 250,001-500,000, 500,001-1,000,000, 1,000,001-5,000,000, 5,000,001-25,000,000, 25,000,001-50,000,000, 50,000,001-2,000,000,000) | Block C: Type of Income (None, Dividends, Rent, Interest, Capital Gains, Excepted/Blind Trust, Tax Deferred, Partnership Income) | Block D: Amount of Income (0-0, 0.01-200, 201-1,000, 1,001-2,500, 2,501-5,000, 5,001-15,000, 15,001-50,000, 50,001-100,000, 100,001-1,000,000, 1,000,001-5,000,000, 5,000,001-1,000,000,000, Spouse/DC Income over 1,000,000) | Block E: Transaction (P, S, S(part), or E). Single Amount of Income block. Data occupies only the top half of the sheet; page ends after WPX ENERGY row. Two-line asset names for the three Goldman Sachs structured notes joined into single rows.
